name: JUURYU NAGE: GANSO BAKUDAN (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: POWERBOMB)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be used on a target that is a size category no larger than yours, which you must currently be in a grapple with. Make an opposed grapple check against the target. If it hits, you slam the opponent into the ground, dealing your unarmed attack damage, plus 1 per Strength and Speed Rank you are currently benefiting from (maximum +5). In addition, the target is staggered for two rounds (Fortitude negates).

The target is left prone after this technique hits, but both you and the target will no longer be grappled.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 4d6 bonus damage.
